mapper.sql:
WITH OPEN_INFO AS ( /* 개통건수 */ SELECT A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE AS STAT_DT , A.OPEN_AGNT_CD , SUM(DECODE(B.OPER_TYPE, 'NAC3', 1, 0)) AS NAC_OPEN_CNT , SUM(DECODE(B.OPER_TYPE, 'MNP3', 1, 0)) AS MNP_OPEN_CNT , SUM(DECODE(B.CONTRACT_NUM, NULL, 1, 0)) AS ERR_OPEN_CNT , 0 AS NAC_STOP_CNT , 0 AS MNP_STOP_CNT , 0 AS NAC_CAN_CNT , 0 AS MNP_CAN_CNT , 0 AS NAC_CLOSE_CNT , 0 AS MNP_CLOSE_CNT , C.SOC_CODE , B.REQ_BUY_TYPE , DECODE(B.REQ_BUY_TYPE, 'MM', B.REQ_MODEL_NAME, '') AS MODEL_NM , NVL(C.ENGG_MNTH_CNT, 0) AS ENGG_CNT FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO A , MSP_REQUEST B , MSP_REQUEST_SALEINFO C WHERE A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE BETWEEN '20141101' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 1, 'YYYYMMDD') AND A.PPPO = 'PO' AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND B.REQUEST_KEY = C.REQUEST_KEY (+) GROUP BY A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, A.OPEN_AGNT_CD, B.REQ_BUY_TYPE, C.SOC_CODE, DECODE(B.REQ_BUY_TYPE, 'MM', B.REQ_MODEL_NAME, ''), NVL(C.ENGG_MNTH_CNT, 0) UNION ALL /* 취소건수 */ SELECT SUBSTR(A.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 8) AS STAT_DT , A.OPEN_AGNT_CD , 0 AS NAC_OPEN_CNT , 0 AS MNP_OPEN_CNT , 0 AS ERR_OPEN_CNT , 0 AS NAC_STOP_CNT , 0 AS MNP_STOP_CNT , SUM(DECODE(B.OPER_TYPE, 'NAC3', 1, 0)) AS NAC_CAN_CNT , SUM(DECODE(B.OPER_TYPE, 'MNP3', 1, 0)) AS MNP_CAN_CNT , 0 AS NAC_CLOSE_CNT , 0 AS MNP_CLOSE_CNT , C.SOC_CODE , B.REQ_BUY_TYPE , DECODE(B.REQ_BUY_TYPE, 'MM', B.REQ_MODEL_NAME, '') AS MODEL_NM , NVL(C.ENGG_MNTH_CNT, 0) AS ENGG_CNT FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO A , MSP_REQUEST B , MSP_REQUEST_SALEINFO C WHERE A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE BETWEEN '20141101' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 1, 'YYYYMMDD') AND A.PPPO = 'PO' AND A.SUB_STATUS = 'C' AND TO_DATE(SUBSTR(A.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 8), 'YYYYMMDD') - TO_DATE(A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') < 15 AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND B.REQUEST_KEY = C.REQUEST_KEY (+) GROUP BY SUBSTR(A.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 8), A.OPEN_AGNT_CD, B.REQ_BUY_TYPE, C.SOC_CODE, DECODE(B.REQ_BUY_TYPE, 'MM', B.REQ_MODEL_NAME, ''), NVL(C.ENGG_MNTH_CNT, 0) UNION ALL /* 정지건수 */ SELECT SUBSTR(A.EVNT_TRTM_DT, 1, 8) AS STAT_DT , A.OPEN_AGNT_CD , 0 AS NAC_OPEN_CNT , 0 AS MNP_OPEN_CNT , 0 AS ERR_OPEN_CNT , SUM(DECODE(B.OPER_TYPE, 'NAC3', 1, 0)) AS NAC_STOP_CNT , SUM(DECODE(B.OPER_TYPE, 'MNP3', 1, 0)) AS MNP_STOP_CNT , 0 AS NAC_CAN_CNT , 0 AS MNP_CAN_CNT , 0 AS NAC_CLOSE_CNT , 0 AS MNP_CLOSE_CNT , C.SOC_CODE , B.REQ_BUY_TYPE , DECODE(B.REQ_BUY_TYPE, 'MM', B.REQ_MODEL_NAME, '') AS MODEL_NM , NVL(C.ENGG_MNTH_CNT, 0) AS ENGG_CNT FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO A , MSP_REQUEST B , MSP_REQUEST_SALEINFO C WHERE A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE BETWEEN '20141101' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 1, 'YYYYMMDD') AND A.PPPO = 'PO' AND A.SUB_STATUS = 'S' AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND B.REQUEST_KEY = C.REQUEST_KEY (+) GROUP BY SUBSTR(A.EVNT_TRTM_DT, 1, 8), A.OPEN_AGNT_CD, B.REQ_BUY_TYPE, C.SOC_CODE, DECODE(B.REQ_BUY_TYPE, 'MM', B.REQ_MODEL_NAME, ''), NVL(C.ENGG_MNTH_CNT, 0) UNION ALL /* 해지건수 */ SELECT SUBSTR(A.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 8) AS STAT_DT , A.OPEN_AGNT_CD , 0 AS NAC_OPEN_CNT , 0 AS MNP_OPEN_CNT , 0 AS ERR_OPEN_CNT , 0 AS NAC_STOP_CNT , 0 AS MNP_STOP_CNT , 0 AS NAC_CAN_CNT , 0 AS MNP_CAN_CNT , SUM(DECODE(B.OPER_TYPE, 'NAC3', 1, 0)) AS NAC_CLOSE_CNT , SUM(DECODE(B.OPER_TYPE, 'MNP3', 1, 0)) AS MNP_CLOSE_CNT , C.SOC_CODE , B.REQ_BUY_TYPE , DECODE(B.REQ_BUY_TYPE, 'MM', B.REQ_MODEL_NAME, '') AS MODEL_NM , NVL(C.ENGG_MNTH_CNT, 0) AS ENGG_CNT FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO A , MSP_REQUEST B , MSP_REQUEST_SALEINFO C WHERE A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE BETWEEN '20141101' AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE - 1, 'YYYYMMDD') AND A.PPPO = 'PO' AND A.SUB_STATUS = 'C' AND TO_DATE(SUBSTR(A.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 8), 'YYYYMMDD') - TO_DATE(A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') < 15 AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND B.REQUEST_KEY = C.REQUEST_KEY (+) GROUP BY SUBSTR(A.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 8), A.OPEN_AGNT_CD, B.REQ_BUY_TYPE, C.SOC_CODE, DECODE(B.REQ_BUY_TYPE, 'MM', B.REQ_MODEL_NAME, ''), NVL(C.ENGG_MNTH_CNT, 0) ) SELECT
TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(A.STAT_DT, 1, 6), 'YYYYMM'), 'YYYY-MM') AS STAT_DT
TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(A.STAT_DT, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS STAT_DT
, A.OPEN_AGNT_CD , FN_GET_ORGNM(A.OPEN_AGNT_CD) AS ORGN_NM , SUM(A.NAC_OPEN_CNT) AS NAC_OPEN_CNT , SUM(A.MNP_OPEN_CNT) AS MNP_OPEN_CNT , SUM(A.ERR_OPEN_CNT) AS ERR_OPEN_CNT , SUM(A.NAC_OPEN_CNT + A.MNP_OPEN_CNT + A.ERR_OPEN_CNT) AS OPEN_CNT , SUM(A.NAC_STOP_CNT) AS NAC_STOP_CNT , SUM(A.MNP_STOP_CNT) AS MNP_STOP_CNT , SUM(A.NAC_STOP_CNT + A.MNP_STOP_CNT) AS STOP_CNT , SUM(A.NAC_CAN_CNT) AS NAC_CAN_CNT , SUM(A.MNP_CAN_CNT) AS MNP_CAN_CNT , SUM(A.NAC_CAN_CNT + A.MNP_CAN_CNT) AS CAN_CNT , SUM(A.NAC_CLOSE_CNT) AS NAC_CLOSE_CNT , SUM(A.MNP_CLOSE_CNT) AS MNP_CLOSE_CNT , SUM(A.NAC_CLOSE_CNT + A.MNP_CLOSE_CNT) AS CLOSE_CNT
, SUM(SUM(A.NAC_OPEN_CNT + A.MNP_OPEN_CNT + A.ERR_OPEN_CNT) - (SUM(A.NAC_CAN_CNT + A.MNP_CAN_CNT + A.NAC_CLOSE_CNT + A.MNP_CLOSE_CNT))) OVER (PARTITION BY A.OPEN_AGNT_CD ORDER BY SUBSTR(A.STAT_DT, 1, 6)) AS ACML_CNT
, SUM(SUM(A.NAC_OPEN_CNT + A.MNP_OPEN_CNT + A.ERR_OPEN_CNT) - (SUM(A.NAC_CAN_CNT + A.MNP_CAN_CNT + A.NAC_CLOSE_CNT + A.MNP_CLOSE_CNT))) OVER (PARTITION BY A.OPEN_AGNT_CD ORDER BY A.STAT_DT) AS ACML_CNT
FROM OPEN_INFO A WHERE 1 = 1
AND SUBSTR(A.STAT_DT, 1, 6) BETWEEN SUBSTR(#{strtDt}, 1, 6) AND SUBSTR(#{endDt}, 1, 6)
AND A.STAT_DT BETWEEN #{strtDt} AND #{endDt}
GROUP BY A.OPEN_AGNT_CD
, SUBSTR(A.STAT_DT, 1, 6)
, A.STAT_DT
ORDER BY 1, 2
mapper.select: /* StatsMgmtMapper.getOpenStatList */
/* StatsMgmtMapper.getOpenStatListEx */

/* StatsMgmtMapper.getOpenStatListEx */
SELECT
TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(A.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 6), 'YYYYMM'), 'YYYY-MM') AS STAT_DT,
TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(A.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 8), 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS STAT_DT,
DECODE(NVL(A.PPPO, 'PP'), 'PP', '선불', '후불') AS PPPO, COUNT(*) AS CAN_CNT FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO A WHERE 1 = 1
AND SUBSTR(A.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 6) BETWEEN SUBSTR(#{strtDt}, 1, 6) AND SUBSTR(#{endDt}, 1, 6)
AND SUBSTR(A.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 8) BETWEEN #{strtDt} AND #{endDt}
AND A.SUB_STATUS = 'C' AND SUBSTR(A.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 8) <> LST_COM_ACTV_DATE AND TO_DATE(SUBSTR(A.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 8), 'YYYYMMDD') - TO_DATE(A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') > 14 GROUP BY
TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(A.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 6), 'YYYYMM'), 'YYYY-MM'), DECODE(NVL(A.PPPO, 'PP'), 'PP', '선불', '후불')
TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(A.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 8), 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD'), DECODE(NVL(A.PPPO, 'PP'), 'PP', '선불', '후불')
ORDER BY
TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(A.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 6), 'YYYYMM'), 'YYYY-MM'), DECODE(NVL(A.PPPO, 'PP'), 'PP', '선불', '후불')
TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(A.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 8), 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD'), DECODE(NVL(A.PPPO, 'PP'), 'PP', '선불', '후불')
/* StatsMgmtMapper.getStatsRealTimeJson */ SELECT OPER_TYPE, ON_OFF_TYPE, REQ_BUY_TYPE, DATA_TYPE, NAC, CAN, OPER_TYPE2, ON_OFF_TYPE2, REQ_BUY_TYPE2, DATA_TYPE2, NAC2, CAN2 FROM MSP_DAY_MST

/* StatsMgmtMapper.getRateStatsJson */ SELECT C.DATA_TYPE AS DATA_TYPE, C.RATE_NM AS RATE_NM, COUNT(*) AS RATE_CNT FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO A, MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO B, MSP_RATE_MST C WHERE A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AND A.PPPO = 'PO' AND A.SUB_STATUS != 'C' AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND B.EVNT_TRTM_NO = (SELECT MAX(EVNT_TRTM_NO) FROM MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM AND SERVICE_TYPE = 'P') AND B.SERVICE_TYPE = 'P' AND B.SOC = C.RATE_CD GROUP BY C.DATA_TYPE, C.RATE_NM ORDER BY C.DATA_TYPE, C.RATE_NM

/* StatsMgmtMapper.getAgntStatsJson */ SELECT FN_GET_ORGNM(OPEN_AGNT_CD) AS AGNT_NM, COUNT(*) AS AGNT_CNT FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO WHERE LST_COM_ACTV_DATE = TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AND PPPO = 'PO' AND SUB_STATUS != 'C' GROUP BY OPEN_AGNT_CD ORDER BY FN_GET_ORGNM(OPEN_AGNT_CD)
/* StatsMgmtMapper.getStatsSimList */

/* StatsMgmtMapper.getModelOpenList */
SELECT REQ.RES_NO AS resNo /*예약번호 */ , SUB.SCAN_ID AS scanId /*스캔ID */ , REQ.REQUEST_KEY AS requestKey , REQ.PROD_TYPE_NM AS prodTypeNm /*상품구분 */ , SUB.CONTRACT_NUM AS contractNum /*계약번호 */ , SUB.SUB_LINK_NAME AS cstmrNm /*고객명 */ , SUB.USER_SSN AS ssn /*주민번호 */ , SUB.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS subscriberNo /*휴대폰번호 */ , REQ.LST_RATE_NM AS lstRateNm /*현재요금제 */ , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(REQ.SIM_INFO, 36, 1) IN ('A', 'R') THEN ( SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0058' AND CD_VAL = SUBSTR(REQ.SIM_INFO, 1, 2)) ELSE (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0058' AND CD_VAL = SUBSTR(REQ.INST_INFO, 1, 2)) END AS sprtTpNm /*할인유형 */ , REQ.SALE_PLCY_NM AS salePlcyNm /*판매정책 */ , TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(REQ.INST_INFO, 26, 3)) AS enggMnthCnt /*약정개월수 */ , TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(REQ.INST_INFO, 23, 3)) AS instMnthCnt /*할부개월수 */ , SUB.MODEL_NAME AS lstModelNm /*단말모델명 */ , SUB.INTM_SRL_NO AS lstModelSrlNum /*단말일련번호 */ , (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'MSP0003' AND CD_VAL = SUB.SUB_STATUS) AS subStatusNm /*상태 */ , CASE WHEN SUB.SUB_STATUS = 'C' THEN CASE WHEN TO_DATE(SUBSTR(SUB.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 8), 'YYYYMMDD') - TO_DATE(SUB.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') = 0 THEN '당일개통취소'
WHEN TO_DATE(SUBSTR(SUB.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 8), 'YYYYMMDD') - TO_DATE(SUB.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') < 15 THEN '14일이내해지' WHEN TO_DATE(SUBSTR(SUB.SUB_STATUS_DATE, 1, 8), 'YYYYMMDD') - TO_DATE(SUB.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') < 90 THEN '90일이내해지'
ELSE '일반해지' END ELSE '' END AS canRsn /*해지사유 */ , REQ.ON_OFF_TYPE AS onOffType /* 모집경로 */ , (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'RCP0007' AND CD_VAL = REQ.ON_OFF_TYPE) AS onOffTypeNm , REQ.OPEN_MARKET_REFERER AS openMarketReferer /*유입경로 */ , REQ.RECOMMEND_FLAG_NM AS recommendFlagNm /*추천인구분 */ , REQ.RECOMMEND_INFO AS recommendInfo /*추천인정보 */ , REQ.REC_YN AS recYn /*녹취여부 */ , (SELECT ORGN_NM FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST WHERE ORGN_ID = SUB.OPEN_AGNT_CD AND ROWNUM = 1) || '/' || SUB.OPEN_AGNT_CD AS agentNm /*대리점 */ , REQ.SHOP_NM AS shopNm /*판매점 */ , DECODE(REQ.SHOP_USM_ID, NULL, '-' , REQ.SHOP_USM_ID) AS shopUsrId /*판매자명 */ , DECODE(REQ.SHOP_USM_ID, NULL, '-' , (SELECT A.USR_NM FROM CMN_USR_MST A WHERE A.USR_ID = REQ.SHOP_USM_ID)) AS shopUsrNm /*판매자명 */ , REQ.REQ_PAY_TYPE AS reqPayType /*요금납부방법 */ , REQ.REQUEST_STATE_CODE AS requestStateCode /*개통진행상태 */ , REQ.CSTMR_TYPE AS cstmrType /*고객구분코드 */ , SUB.SUB_LINK_NAME AS custNmVoc /*고객명VOC용 */ , SUB.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS ctnVoc /*휴대폰번호VOC용 */ , SUBSTR(REQ.DVC_CHG_INFO, 1, 8) AS dvcChgDt /* 기변일자 */ , TRIM(SUBSTR(REQ.DVC_CHG_INFO, 9, 10)) AS dvcModelId /* 기변모델ID */ , TRIM(SUBSTR(REQ.DVC_CHG_INFO, 19, 30)) AS dvcModelNm /* 기변모델명 */ , TRIM(SUBSTR(REQ.DVC_CHG_INFO, 49, 20)) AS dvcIntmSrlNo /* 기변일련번호 */ , (SELECT ORGN_NM FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST WHERE ORGN_ID = TRIM(SUBSTR(REQ.DVC_CHG_INFO, 69, 10)) AND ROWNUM = 1) AS dvcAgntNm /* 기변대리점 */ , (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'CMN0049' AND CD_VAL = SUBSTR(REQ.DVC_CHG_INFO, 79, 4)) AS dvcOperTypeNm /* 기변유형명 */ , TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(REQ.DVC_CHG_INFO, 83, 10)) AS dvcHndstAmnt /* 기변단말출고가 */ , TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(REQ.DVC_CHG_INFO, 93, 10)) AS dvcInstOrginAmnt /* 기변단말할부원금 */ , TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(REQ.DVC_CHG_INFO, 103, 3)) AS dvcInstMnthCnt /* 기변단말할부개월수 */ , TO_NUMBER(SUBSTR(REQ.DVC_CHG_INFO, 106, 3)) AS dvcEnggMnthCnt /* 기변약정개월수 */ , SUBSTR(REQ.DVC_CHG_INFO, 109) AS dvcSalePlcyNm /* 기변판매정책 */ , SUB.TRNS_YN AS trnsYn /* 이관여부 */ , (SELECT PROMOTION_NM FROM MSP_PROMOTION_MST WHERE PROMOTION_CD = REQ.PROMOTION_CD) AS promotionNm /* 프로모션명 */ FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO SUB , MSP_REQUEST_DTL REQ WHERE SUB.PPPO = 'PO' AND SUB.CONTRACT_NUM = REQ.CONTRACT_NUM AND SUB.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE < TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(#{openEndDate} , 'YYYYMMDD') + 1 , 'YYYYMMDD')
AND SUB.SUB_STATUS IN ('A' , 'S')
AND SUB.SUB_STATUS = 'A'
AND SUB.SUB_STATUS = 'S'
AND SUB.SUB_STATUS = 'C'
AND SUB.MODEL_NAME LIKE '%'|| UPPER(TRIM(#{modelName})) || '%' ORDER BY SUB.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE DESC

/* StatsMgmtMapper.getStatsOsstMgmtList */
SELECT TO_CHAR(TRUNC(REGST_DTTM),'YYYY-MM-DD') AS REG_DT, COUNT(*) AS T_CNT, SUM(DECODE(RSLT_CD,'N',1,'0000',1,0)) AS N_CNT,
SUM(DECODE(RSLT_CD,#{totalErrCd},1,0)) AS E_CNT, ROUND(SUM(DECODE(RSLT_CD,#{totalErrCd},1,0))/COUNT(*)*100)||'%' AS E_PER
SUM(DECODE(RSLT_CD,'N',0,'0000',0,1)) AS E_CNT, ROUND(SUM(DECODE(RSLT_CD,'N',0,'0000',0,1))/COUNT(*)*100)||'%' AS E_PER
FROM MCP_REQUEST_OSST@DL_MCP WHERE REGST_DTTM BETWEEN TRUNC(SYSDATE+1-#{totalDay}) AND SYSDATE AND RSLT_CD IS NOT NULL GROUP BY TRUNC(REGST_DTTM) ORDER BY TRUNC(REGST_DTTM) DESC

/* StatsMgmtMapper.getStatsOsstMgmtDetail */
SELECT MVNO_ORD_NO, OSST_ORD_NO, PRGR_STAT_CD, RSLT_CD, RSLT_MSG, NSTEP_GLOBAL_ID, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(RSLT_DT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS RSLT_DT FROM MCP_REQUEST_OSST@DL_MCP WHERE TO_CHAR(REGST_DTTM,'YYYYMMDD') = #{stdrDate} AND RSLT_CD NOT IN ('N', '0000') AND RSLT_CD = #{errCd} AND PRGR_STAT_CD = #{eventCd} ORDER BY REGST_DTTM DESC

/* StatsMgmtMapper.getStatsOsstMgmtDetailExcel */ SELECT MVNO_ORD_NO, OSST_ORD_NO, PRGR_STAT_CD, RSLT_CD, RSLT_MSG, NSTEP_GLOBAL_ID, TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(RSLT_DT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS RSLT_DT FROM MCP_REQUEST_OSST@DL_MCP WHERE TO_CHAR(REGST_DTTM,'YYYYMMDD') = #{stdrDate} AND RSLT_CD NOT IN ('N', '0000') AND RSLT_CD = #{errCd} AND PRGR_STAT_CD = #{eventCd} ORDER BY REGST_DTTM DESC

/* StatsMgmtMapper.getUsimChgList */
SELECT SEL.MVNO_ORD_NO AS MVNO_ORD_NO /* MVNO 오더번호 */ , SEL.SVC_CONT_ID AS SVC_CONT_ID /* 계약번호 */ , SEL.ICC_ID AS ICC_ID /* 유심번호 */ , SUB.SUB_LINK_NAME AS SUB_LINK_NAME /* 고객명 */ , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SUB.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE,'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS LST_COM_ACTV_DATE /* 개통일 */ , SEL.TLPH_NO AS CTN /* 전화번호 */ , FN_GET_AGE_JAVA(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(SUB.USER_SSN)) AS AGE /* 나이 */ , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(REPLACE(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(SUB.USER_SSN), '-', ''), 7, 1) IN ('1' , '3' , '5' , '7') THEN '남자' WHEN SUBSTR(REPLACE(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(SUB.USER_SSN), '-', ''), 7, 1) IN ('2' , '4' , '6' , '8') THEN '여자' END GENDER /* 성별 */ , (SELECT ORGN_NM FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST WHERE ORGN_ID = SEL.CNTPNT_CD AND ROWNUM = 1) AS OPEN_AGNT_NM /* 개통대리점 */ , FN_GET_CODENM('RCP0007', DTL.ON_OFF_TYPE) AS ON_OFF_TYPE /* 모집유형 */ , TO_CHAR(SEL.CRET_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS' ) AS RDT /* 등록일 */ , DECODE(SEL.PRGR_STAT_CD, 'UC0', '신청접수', 'UC2', '처리완료' , '') AS PRGR_STAT_CD /* 처리상태 */ , SEL.TRGT_ATRIB_SBST AS TRGT_ATRIB_SBST /* 사전체크 결과 */ , SEL.TRGT_FALU_MSG AS TRGT_FALU_MSG /* 사전체크 불가 메시지 */ , SEL.TRGT_INSUR_MSG AS TRGT_INSUR_MSG /* 사전체크 안내 메시지 */ , SEL.RSLT_CD AS RSLT_CD /* 결과코드 */ , SEL.RSLT_MSG AS RSLT_MSG /* 결과메시지 */ FROM MCP_SELF_USIM_CHG@DL_MCP SEL ,MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO SUB ,MSP_REQUEST_DTL DTL WHERE SEL.SVC_CONT_ID = SUB.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND SUB.CONTRACT_NUM = DTL.CONTRACT_NUM(+)
AND TO_CHAR(SEL.CRET_DT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') BETWEEN #{srchStrtDt} || '000000' AND #{srchEndDt} || '235959'
AND (SEL.SVC_CONT_ID = #{searchName} OR SEL.SVC_CONT_ID = (SELECT DISTINCT CONTRACT_NUM FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO_HIST WHERE SVC_CNTR_NO = #{searchName}))
AND SEL.TLPH_NO = #{searchName}
AND (SEL.RSLT_CD <> '0000' OR SEL.RSLT_CD IS NULL)
AND SEL.RSLT_CD = '0000'
ORDER BY SEL.CRET_DT DESC

/* StatsMgmtMapper.getUsimChgListExcel */ SELECT SEL.MVNO_ORD_NO AS MVNO_ORD_NO /* MVNO 오더번호 */ , SEL.SVC_CONT_ID AS SVC_CONT_ID /* 계약번호 */ , NVL(SEL.ICC_ID, ' ') AS ICC_ID /* 유심번호 */ , SUB.SUB_LINK_NAME AS SUB_LINK_NAME /* 고객명 */ , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SUB.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE,'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS LST_COM_ACTV_DATE /* 개통일 */ , SEL.TLPH_NO AS CTN /* 전화번호 */ , FN_GET_AGE_JAVA(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(SUB.USER_SSN)) AS AGE /* 나이 */ , NVL(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(REPLACE(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(SUB.USER_SSN), '-', ''), 7, 1) IN ('1' , '3' , '5' , '7') THEN '남자' WHEN SUBSTR(REPLACE(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(SUB.USER_SSN), '-', ''), 7, 1) IN ('2' , '4' , '6' , '8') THEN '여자' END, ' ') AS GENDER /* 성별 */ , (SELECT ORGN_NM FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST WHERE ORGN_ID = SEL.CNTPNT_CD AND ROWNUM = 1) AS OPEN_AGNT_NM /* 개통대리점 */ , NVL(FN_GET_CODENM('RCP0007', DTL.ON_OFF_TYPE) , '') AS ON_OFF_TYPE /* 모집유형 */ , TO_CHAR(SEL.CRET_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS' ) AS RDT /* 등록일 */ , NVL(DECODE(SEL.PRGR_STAT_CD, 'UC0', '신청접수', 'UC2', '처리완료' , ''), ' ') AS PRGR_STAT_CD /* 처리상태 */ , NVL(SEL.TRGT_ATRIB_SBST , ' ') AS TRGT_ATRIB_SBST /* 사전체크 결과 */ , NVL(SEL.TRGT_FALU_MSG , ' ') AS TRGT_FALU_MSG /* 사전체크 불가 메시지 */ , NVL(SEL.TRGT_INSUR_MSG , ' ') AS TRGT_INSUR_MSG /* 사전체크 안내 메시지 */ , NVL(SEL.RSLT_CD , ' ') AS RSLT_CD /* 결과코드 */ , NVL(SEL.RSLT_MSG , ' ') AS RSLT_MSG /* 결과메시지 */ FROM MCP_SELF_USIM_CHG@DL_MCP SEL ,MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO SUB ,MSP_REQUEST_DTL DTL WHERE SEL.SVC_CONT_ID = SUB.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND SUB.CONTRACT_NUM = DTL.CONTRACT_NUM(+)
AND TO_CHAR(SEL.CRET_DT, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') BETWEEN #{srchStrtDt} || '000000' AND #{srchEndDt} || '235959'
AND (SEL.SVC_CONT_ID = #{searchName} OR SEL.SVC_CONT_ID = (SELECT DISTINCT CONTRACT_NUM FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO_HIST WHERE SVC_CNTR_NO = #{searchName}))
AND SEL.TLPH_NO = #{searchName}
AND (SEL.RSLT_CD <> '0000' OR SEL.RSLT_CD IS NULL)
AND SEL.RSLT_CD = '0000'
ORDER BY SEL.CRET_DT DESC

/* StatsMgmtMapper.getNameChgDtl */ SELECT SEL.CUST_REQ_SEQ AS CUST_REQ_SEQ /* 시퀀스 */ , SEL.CONTRACT_NUM AS SVC_CONT_ID /* 계약번호 */ , SEL.CONTRACT_NUM AS CONTRACT_NUM /* 계약번호 */ , SUB.ON_OFF_TYPE AS ON_OFF_TYPE /* 모집경로 */ , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EMV_SCAN_FILE@DL_MCP WHERE SCAN_ID = SUB.SCAN_ID ) AS SCAN_FILE_CNT /* 파일건수 */ , SUB.SCAN_ID AS SCAN_ID /* 스캔ID */ , CAL.SCAN_ID AS NEW_SCAN_ID /* 신규 스캔ID */ , DTL.RES_NO AS RES_NO /* 예약번호 */ , SEL.CSTMR_NAME AS SUB_LINK_NAME /* 고객명 */ , TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SUB.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE,'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS LST_COM_ACTV_DATE /* 개통일 */ , SEL.MOBILE_NO AS CTN /* 양도인전화번호 */ , CAL.CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_FN || CAL.CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_MN || CAL.CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_RN AS CTN_GET /* 양수인전화번호 */ , FN_GET_AGE_JAVA(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(SUB.USER_SSN)) AS AGE /* 나이 */ , CASE WHEN SUBSTR(REPLACE(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(SUB.USER_SSN), '-', ''), 7, 1) IN ('1' , '3' , '5' , '7') THEN '남자' WHEN SUBSTR(REPLACE(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(SUB.USER_SSN), '-', ''), 7, 1) IN ('2' , '4' , '6' , '8') THEN '여자' END AS GENDER /* 성별 */ , (SELECT ORGN_NM FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST WHERE ORGN_ID = SUB.OPEN_AGNT_CD AND ROWNUM = 1) AS OPEN_AGNT_NM /* 개통대리점 */ , FN_GET_CODENM('RCP0007', DTL.ON_OFF_TYPE) AS ON_OFF_TYPE_NM /* 모집유형 */ , (SELECT DTL_CD_NM FROM NMCP_CD_DTL@DL_MCP WHERE CD_GROUP_ID = 'CL01' AND DTL_CD = CAL.PROC_CD) AS PROC_CD_NM /* 결과 */ , CAL.PROC_CD AS PROC_CD /* 결과코드 */ , TO_CHAR(CAL.CRET_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS' ) AS SYS_RDATE /* 등록일 */ , TO_CHAR(CAL.RVISN_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS' ) AS SYS_UDATE /* 수정일 */ , (SELECT USR_NM FROM CMN_USR_MST WHERE USR_ID = CAL.RVISN_ID) AS UPDT_ID /* 수정자 */ , CAL.MEMO AS CL_MEMO /* 메모 */ , CAL.CLAUSE_CNTR_DEL_FLAG AS CLAUSE_CNTR_DEL_FLAG /* 약관_고객정보삭제동의_양도인 */ , CAL.CLAUSE_ESS_COLLECT_FLAG AS CLAUSE_ESS_COLLECT_FLAG /* 약관_고유식별 정보수집이용동의 */ , CAL.CLAUSE_JEHU_FLAG AS CLAUSE_JEHU_FLAG /* 약관_제휴서비스를 위한 동의 */ , CAL.CLAUSE_PRI_AD_FLAG AS CLAUSE_PRI_AD_FLAG /* 약관_정보,광고 전송을 위한 개인정보이용 동의 */ , CAL.CLAUSE_PRI_COLLECT_FLAG AS CLAUSE_PRI_COLLECT_FLAG /* 약관_개인정보 수집동의 */ , CAL.CLAUSE_PRI_OFFER_FLAG AS CLAUSE_PRI_OFFER_FLAG /* 약관_개인정보 제공동의 */ , CAL.PERSONAL_INFO_COLLECT_AGREE AS PERSONAL_INFO_COLLECT_AGREE /* 약관_개인정보 수집이용 동의(혜택) */ , CAL.OTHERS_TRNS_AGREE AS OTHERS_TRNS_AGREE /* 약관_제 3자 제공 동의 */ , CAL.OTHERS_TRNS_KT_AGREE AS OTHERS_TRNS_KT_AGREE /* 약관_혜택 제공을 위한 제3자 제공 동의(KT) */ , CAL.OTHERS_AD_RECEIVE_AGREE AS OTHERS_AD_RECEIVE_AGREE /* 제3자 제공관련 광고 수신 동의 */ , CAL.CSTMR_ADDR AS CSTMR_ADDR /* 주소_양도인 */ , CAL.CSTMR_ADDR_DTL AS CSTMR_ADDR_DTL /* 상세주소_양도인 */ , (SELECT DTL_CD_NM FROM NMCP_CD_DTL@DL_MCP WHERE CD_GROUP_ID = 'STRE' AND DTL_CD = CAL.CSTMR_BILL_SEND_CODE ) AS CSTMR_BILL_SEND_CODE /* 명세서종류_양도인 */ , CAL.CSTMR_MAIL AS CSTMR_MAIL /* 이메일_양도인 */ , CAL.CSTMR_NAME AS CSTMR_NAME /* 고객명_양도인 */ , CAL.CSTMR_POST AS CSTMR_POST /* 우편번호_양도인 */ , CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(CAL.REQ_ACCOUNT_NUMBER) AS REQ_ACCOUNT_NUMBER /* 계좌이체_계좌번호_양도인 */ , (SELECT DTL_CD_NM FROM NMCP_CD_DTL@DL_MCP WHERE CD_GROUP_ID = 'BNK' AND DTL_CD = CAL.REQ_BANK ) AS REQ_BANK /* 계좌이체_은행코드_양도인 */ , CAL.REQ_CARD_COMPANY AS REQ_CARD_COMPANY /* 신용카드_카드사_양도인 */ , CAL.REQ_CARD_MM AS REQ_CARD_MM /* 신용카드_유효월_양도인 */ , CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(CAL.REQ_CARD_NO) AS REQ_CARD_NO /* 신용카드_번호_양도인 */ , CAL.REQ_CARD_MM || '/' || CAL.REQ_CARD_YY AS REQ_CARD_YY /* 신용카드_유효년_양도인 */ , CAL.REQ_INFO_CHG_YN AS REQ_INFO_CHG_YN /* 가입정보변경여부_양도인 */ , FN_GET_CODENM('RCP0036', CAL.REQ_PAY_TYPE) AS REQ_PAY_TYPE /* 요금납부방법_양도인 */ , CAL.SELF_ISSU_EXPR_DT AS SELF_ISSU_EXPR_DT /* 신분증인증_발급/만료일자_양도인 */ , CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(CAL.SELF_ISSU_NUM) AS SELF_ISSU_NUM /* 신분증인증_발급번호_양도인 */ , (SELECT RATE_NM FROM MSP_RATE_MST WHERE RATE_CD = CAL.SOC) AS SOC /* 요금제_양도인 */ , FN_GET_CODENM('RCP2006', CAL.SELF_CERT_TYPE) AS SELF_CERT_TYPE_NM /* 신분증유형_양도인 */ , CAL.SELF_CERT_TYPE AS SELF_CERT_TYPE /* 신분증유형_양도인 */ , CAL.SCAN_ID AS ORG_SCAN_ID /* 생성된 스캔ID */ , NVL((SELECT (SELECT ORGN_NM FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST WHERE ORGN_ID = PUM.ORGN_ID AND ROWNUM = 1) FROM MSP_PARTNER_USIM_MST PUM WHERE SUB.ICC_ID = PUM.USIM_NO), 'M모바일(직영온라인)') AS USIM_ORG_NM , CAL.JEHU_PROD_TYPE /*요금제 제휴처*/ , FN_GET_CODENM('RCP2038',CAL.CSTMR_FOREIGNER_NATION) AS CSTMR_FN_NM /* 국적 */ , CAL.MCN_RES_NO , '1100011741' AS CNTPNT_SHOP_ID , (SELECT KT_ORG_ID FROM ORG_ORGN_INFO_MST WHERE ORGN_ID = '1100011741' AND ROWNUM = 1) AS MNGM_AGNC_ID , CAL.CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_FN , CAL.CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_MN , CAL.CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_RN , CAL.FATH_TRG_YN , CAL.CLAUSE_FATH_FLAG , CAL.FATH_TRANSAC_ID , SUBSTR(CAL.FATH_CMPLT_NTFY_DT, 1, 8) AS FATH_CMPLT_NTFY_DT , CAL.FATH_TEL_NO AS SMS_RCV_TEL_NO , CAL.MCN_STATE_CODE , FN_GET_CODENM('RCP0090', CAL.MCN_STATE_CODE) AS MCN_STATE_CODE_NM , SEL.CSTMR_TYPE AS NOR_CSTMR_TYPE , AGT.NOR_AGENT_NAME , AGT.NOR_AGENT_TYPE_CD , CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(NOR_AGENT_RRN) AS NOR_AGENT_RRN , AGT.NOR_AGENT_SELF_INQRY_AGRM_YN , AGT.NOR_AGENT_TEL_NO , CAL.CSTMR_TYPE AS NEE_CSTMR_TYPE , CAL.CSTMR_TYPE AS CSTMR_TYPE , AGT.NEE_AGENT_NAME , AGT.NEE_AGENT_TYPE_CD , CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(AGT.NEE_AGENT_RRN) AS NEE_AGENT_RRN , AGT.NEE_AGENT_TEL_NO , AGT.NEE_AGENT_SELF_INQRY_AGRM_YN , AGT.NEE_AGENT_SELF_CERT_TYPE AS MINOR_SELF_CERT_TYPE , AGT.NEE_AGENT_SELF_ISSU_EXPR_DT , CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(AGT.NEE_AGENT_SELF_ISSU_NUM) AS NEE_AGENT_SELF_ISSU_NUM FROM NMCP_CUST_REQUEST_MST@DL_MCP SEL ,NMCP_CUST_REQUEST_NAME_CHG@DL_MCP CAL ,MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO SUB ,MSP_REQUEST_DTL DTL ,NMCP_CUST_REQ_NAME_CHG_AGENT@DL_MCP AGT WHERE SEL.CUST_REQ_SEQ = CAL.CUST_REQ_SEQ AND SEL.CUST_REQ_SEQ = AGT.CUST_REQ_SEQ(+) AND SEL.CONTRACT_NUM = SUB.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND SUB.CONTRACT_NUM = DTL.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND SEL.CUST_REQ_SEQ = #{custReqSeq}

/* StatsMgmtMapper.getOwnPhoNumReqList */
SELECT AA.SYS_RDATE , AA.ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE_NM , AA.CSTMR_NAME , AA.BIRTH , AA.GENDER , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO WHERE CUSTOMER_ID = AA.CUSTOMER_ID AND SUB_STATUS NOT IN ('C')) AS LINE_CNT FROM ( SELECT TO_CHAR(A.SYS_RDATE,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MM:SS') AS SYS_RDATE , A.ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE , (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'RCP2001' AND CD_VAL = A.ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE AND USG_YN = 'Y') AS ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE_NM , A.CSTMR_NAME , SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(A.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN),1,6) AS BIRTH , SUBSTR(CRYPTO_AES256.DEC_AES(A.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN),7,1) AS GENDER , ( SELECT CUS.CUSTOMER_ID FROM ( SELECT CUSTOMER_ID , CUSTOMER_LINK_NAME , CUSTOMER_SSN , RANK() OVER(PARTITION BY CUSTOMER_SSN, CUSTOMER_LINK_NAME ORDER BY EVNT_TRTM_DT DESC) CNT FROM MSP_JUO_CUS_INFO ) CUS WHERE CUS.CUSTOMER_LINK_NAME = A.CSTMR_NAME AND CUS.CUSTOMER_SSN = A.CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN AND CUS.CNT = 1 ) AS CUSTOMER_ID FROM NMCP_OWN_PHO_NUM_HST@DL_MCP A WHERE TO_CHAR(A.SYS_RDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') BETWEEN #{srchStrtDt} || '000000' AND #{srchEndDt} || '235959'
AND A.CSTMR_NAME LIKE '%' || #{searchName} || '%'
ORDER BY A.SYS_RDATE DESC ) AA

/*StatsMgmtMapper.getCsResDtlInfoList*/
SELECT CRC.CS_RES_SEQ /*예약순번*/ ,CRC.REGST_DT /*등록일(접수일)*/ ,SUB.SUB_LINK_NAME AS CSTMR_NM /*고객명*/ ,CRC.CONTRACT_NUM /*계약번호*/ ,CRC.CS_STAT_CD /*처리상태코드*/ ,CASE NVL(CRC.CS_STAT_CD,'RCP') WHEN 'COM' THEN '완료' WHEN 'TRS' THEN '진행중' ELSE '미처리' END AS CS_STAT /*처리상태명*/ ,TO_CHAR(CRC.COM_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS END_DTTM /*처리일시*/ ,FN_GET_CODENM('VOC0025',CRC.VOC_FIR) AS VOC_FIR /*VOC(대)*/ ,FN_GET_CODENM('VOC0026',CRC.VOC_SEC) AS VOC_SEC /*VOC(중)*/ ,FN_GET_CODENM('VOC0027',CRC.VOC_THI) AS VOC_THI /*VOC(소)*/ ,FN_GET_CODENM('VOC0028',CRC.VOC_DTL) AS VOC_DTL /*VOC(상세)*/ ,CRC.COM_AP_ID AS AP_ID /*AP계정*/ ,F_GET_ADMIN_NM(CRC.COM_AP_ID) AS AP_NM /*AP 사용자명*/ FROM MSP_CS_RES_CSTMR CRC, MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO SUB WHERE CRC.CONTRACT_NUM = SUB.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND CS_RES_DT= #{csResDt} AND CS_RES_TM= #{csResTm} AND NVL(DEL_YN, 'N') != 'Y' ORDER BY CRC.REGST_DTTM

/*StatsMgmtMapper.getCsResPerCntByDt*/ SELECT CS_RES_DT ,SUM(DECODE(CS_RES_TM,'AM01', PER_CNT, 0)) AS AM01 ,SUM(DECODE(CS_RES_TM,'AM02', PER_CNT, 0)) AS AM02 ,SUM(DECODE(CS_RES_TM,'AM03', PER_CNT, 0)) AS AM03 ,SUM(DECODE(CS_RES_TM,'AM04', PER_CNT, 0)) AS AM04 ,SUM(DECODE(CS_RES_TM,'AM05', PER_CNT, 0)) AS AM05 ,SUM(DECODE(CS_RES_TM,'AM06', PER_CNT, 0)) AS AM06 ,SUM(DECODE(CS_RES_TM,'AM07', PER_CNT, 0)) AS AM07 ,SUM(DECODE(CS_RES_TM,'AM08', PER_CNT, 0)) AS AM08 ,SUM(DECODE(CS_RES_TM,'PM01', PER_CNT, 0)) AS PM01 ,SUM(DECODE(CS_RES_TM,'PM02', PER_CNT, 0)) AS PM02 ,SUM(DECODE(CS_RES_TM,'PM03', PER_CNT, 0)) AS PM03 ,SUM(DECODE(CS_RES_TM,'PM04', PER_CNT, 0)) AS PM04 ,SUM(DECODE(CS_RES_TM,'PM05', PER_CNT, 0)) AS PM05 ,SUM(DECODE(CS_RES_TM,'PM06', PER_CNT, 0)) AS PM06 ,SUM(DECODE(CS_RES_TM,'PM07', PER_CNT, 0)) AS PM07 ,SUM(DECODE(CS_RES_TM,'PM08', PER_CNT, 0)) AS PM08 ,SUM(DECODE(CS_RES_TM,'PM09', PER_CNT, 0)) AS PM09 ,SUM(DECODE(CS_RES_TM,'PM10', PER_CNT, 0)) AS PM10 ,SUM(DECODE(CS_RES_TM,'PM11', PER_CNT, 0)) AS PM11 ,SUM(DECODE(CS_RES_TM,'PM12', PER_CNT, 0)) AS PM12 ,SUM(DECODE(CS_RES_TM,'PM13', PER_CNT, 0)) AS PM13 ,SUM(DECODE(CS_RES_TM,'PM14', PER_CNT, 0)) AS PM14 FROM MSP_CS_RES WHERE CS_RES_DT= #{csResDt} GROUP BY CS_RES_DT
/*StatsMgmtMapper.getMaxPerCnt*/ SELECT CD_VAL AS MAX_PER_CNT FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID= 'VOC0029' AND USG_YN= 'Y' ORDER BY ETC1 DESC

/*StatsMgmtMapper.getCsResListExcel*/ SELECT RES.REGST_DT_FORMAT /*등록일(접수일)*/ ,RES.CS_RES_DT_FORMAT /*예약일시*/ ,RES.CS_RES_TM_NM /*접수시간대*/ ,RES.PER_CNT /*허용인원*/ ,(CASE WHEN RES.PER_CNT-RES.RES_CNT <= 0 THEN '종결' WHEN TO_DATE((RES.CS_RES_DT || '00:00:00'),'YYYYMMDDHH24:MI:SS') > SYSDATE THEN '예약가능' ELSE '종결' END) AS RES_STAT /*상태값(예약가능,종결)*/ ,RES.CSTMR_NM /*고객명*/ ,RES.CONTRACT_NUM /*계약번호*/ ,RES.RES_CNT /*예약고객수*/ ,RES.PER_CNT-RES.RES_CNT AS REMAIN_CNT /*예약가능고객수*/ ,RES.COM_CNT /*종결고객*/ ,RES.RES_CNT-RES.COM_CNT AS UNCOM_CNT /*상담미완료고객수*/ ,RES.CS_STAT /*처리결과*/ ,RES.VOC_FIR /*VOC(대)*/ ,RES.VOC_SEC /*VOC(중)*/ ,RES.VOC_THI /*VOC(소)*/ ,RES.VOC_DTL /*VOC(상세)*/ ,RES.AP_NM /*처리자명*/ ,RES.AP_ID /*처리자계정*/ ,RES.END_DTTM /*처리일시*/ FROM( SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(CRC.REGST_DT, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS REGST_DT_FORMAT ,CRC.REGST_DTTM ,TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(CRC.CS_RES_DT, 'YYYYMMDD'), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS CS_RES_DT_FORMAT ,CRC.CS_RES_DT ,CRC.CS_RES_TM ,FN_GET_CODENM('VOC0024', CRC.CS_RES_TM) AS CS_RES_TM_NM ,(SELECT PER_CNT FROM MSP_CS_RES WHERE CS_RES_DT= CRC.CS_RES_DT AND CS_RES_TM= CRC.CS_RES_TM) AS PER_CNT ,SUBSTR(FN_GET_CODENM('VOC0024', CRC.CS_RES_TM),7,5) AS DEADLINE ,(SELECT COUNT(CS_RES_SEQ) FROM MSP_CS_RES_CSTMR WHERE CS_RES_DT= CRC.CS_RES_DT AND CS_RES_TM= CRC.CS_RES_TM AND NVL(DEL_YN,'N') != 'Y') AS RES_CNT ,(SELECT COUNT(CS_RES_SEQ) FROM MSP_CS_RES_CSTMR WHERE CS_RES_DT= CRC.CS_RES_DT AND CS_RES_TM= CRC.CS_RES_TM AND NVL(DEL_YN,'N') != 'Y' AND CS_STAT_CD= 'COM') as COM_CNT ,SUB.SUB_LINK_NAME AS CSTMR_NM ,CRC.CONTRACT_NUM ,CASE NVL(CRC.CS_STAT_CD,'RCP') WHEN 'COM' THEN '완료' WHEN 'TRS' THEN '진행중' ELSE '미처리' END AS CS_STAT ,FN_GET_CODENM('VOC0025',CRC.VOC_FIR) AS VOC_FIR ,FN_GET_CODENM('VOC0026',CRC.VOC_SEC) AS VOC_SEC ,FN_GET_CODENM('VOC0027',CRC.VOC_THI) AS VOC_THI ,FN_GET_CODENM('VOC0028',CRC.VOC_DTL) AS VOC_DTL ,F_GET_ADMIN_NM(CRC.COM_AP_ID) AS AP_NM ,CRC.COM_AP_ID AS AP_ID ,TO_CHAR(CRC.COM_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS END_DTTM FROM MSP_CS_RES_CSTMR CRC, MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO SUB WHERE CRC.CONTRACT_NUM = SUB.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND CRC.CS_RES_DT BETWEEN #{srchStrtDt} AND #{srchEndDt} AND NVL(DEL_YN, 'N') != 'Y' ) RES ORDER BY RES.CS_RES_DT DESC, RES.CS_RES_TM, RES.REGST_DTTM

/*StatsMgmtMapper.getCsResCntByDt*/ SELECT CS_RES_DT ,SUM(DECODE(CS_RES_TM,'AM01', 1, 0)) AS AM01 ,SUM(DECODE(CS_RES_TM,'AM02', 1, 0)) AS AM02 ,SUM(DECODE(CS_RES_TM,'AM03', 1, 0)) AS AM03 ,SUM(DECODE(CS_RES_TM,'AM04', 1, 0)) AS AM04 ,SUM(DECODE(CS_RES_TM,'AM05', 1, 0)) AS AM05 ,SUM(DECODE(CS_RES_TM,'AM06', 1, 0)) AS AM06 ,SUM(DECODE(CS_RES_TM,'AM07', 1, 0)) AS AM07 ,SUM(DECODE(CS_RES_TM,'AM08', 1, 0)) AS AM08 ,SUM(DECODE(CS_RES_TM,'PM01', 1, 0)) AS PM01 ,SUM(DECODE(CS_RES_TM,'PM02', 1, 0)) AS PM02 ,SUM(DECODE(CS_RES_TM,'PM03', 1, 0)) AS PM03 ,SUM(DECODE(CS_RES_TM,'PM04', 1, 0)) AS PM04 ,SUM(DECODE(CS_RES_TM,'PM05', 1, 0)) AS PM05 ,SUM(DECODE(CS_RES_TM,'PM06', 1, 0)) AS PM06 ,SUM(DECODE(CS_RES_TM,'PM07', 1, 0)) AS PM07 ,SUM(DECODE(CS_RES_TM,'PM08', 1, 0)) AS PM08 ,SUM(DECODE(CS_RES_TM,'PM09', 1, 0)) AS PM09 ,SUM(DECODE(CS_RES_TM,'PM10', 1, 0)) AS PM10 ,SUM(DECODE(CS_RES_TM,'PM11', 1, 0)) AS PM11 ,SUM(DECODE(CS_RES_TM,'PM12', 1, 0)) AS PM12 ,SUM(DECODE(CS_RES_TM,'PM13', 1, 0)) AS PM13 ,SUM(DECODE(CS_RES_TM,'PM14', 1, 0)) AS PM14 FROM MSP_CS_RES_CSTMR WHERE CS_RES_DT= #{csResDt} AND NVL(DEL_YN, 'N')!= 'Y' GROUP BY CS_RES_DT
/*StatsMgmtMapper.getPrmtAutoAddDetail*/

/* StatsMgmtMapper.getCstmrChk */ SELECT A.PRMT_ID ,B.DIS_PRMT_ID ,A.PRMT_AGNT_CD ,A.SUCC_YN ,A.FNL_SUCC_YN ,A.PROC_YN ,B.CONTRACT_NUM ,A.EFFECTIVE_DATE ,A.EVNT_CD ,SUBSTR(B.SIM_INFO,36,1) AS SIM_INFO FROM MSP_DIS_PRC_MST A ,MSP_REQUEST_DTL B WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.PRC_MST_SEQ = #{prcMstSeq}

SELECT CASE WHEN A.APPL_END_DTTM = '99991231000000' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS APPL_END_DTTM FROM MSP_DVC_CHG_AGNT_HST A WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} AND A.APPL_STRT_DTTM = (SELECT MAX(APPL_STRT_DTTM) FROM MSP_DVC_CHG_AGNT_HST WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = A.CONTRACT_NUM)
/*StatsMgmtMapper.getRtyCanDt*/ SELECT CD_VAL FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID= 'CMN0096' AND USG_YN= 'Y'
/*StatsMgmtMapper.getPrmtAutoChkList*/
SELECT ('PR' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'YYYYMMDD') || TRIM(TO_CHAR(SQ_DIS_PR.NEXTVAL, '000000'))) AS PRC_RTY_SEQ FROM DUAL

/*StatsMgmtMapper.getPrmtnotAddSocCnt*/ SELECT COUNT(PRMT_ID) FROM MSP_DIS_ADD WHERE PRMT_ID = (SELECT PRMT_ID FROM MSP_DIS_PRC_MST WHERE PRC_MST_SEQ = #{prcMstSeq}) AND SOC NOT IN (SELECT SOC FROM MSP_DIS_PRC_DTL A WHERE A.PRC_MST_SEQ = #{prcMstSeq} AND A.RSLT_CD = '0000' UNION SELECT SOC FROM MSP_DIS_PRC_RTY B WHERE B.RSLT_CD = '0000' AND B.PRC_MST_SEQ = #{prcMstSeq})

/*StatsMgmtMapper.getDisPrmtTrgMgmtDtl*/
SELECT TRG_DTL_SEQ ,REGST_DT ,PROC_YN ,PROC_ID ,TO_CHAR(PROC_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS PROC_DTTM ,CONTRACT_NUM ,(SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID ='CMN0091' AND CD_VAL = A.EVNT_CD) AS EVNT_CD ,EVNT_TRTM_NO ,EVNT_TRTM_DT ,EFFECTIVE_DATE ,REGST_ID ,TO_CHAR(REGST_DTTM, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS REGST_DTTM FROM MSP_DIS_TRG_DTL A WHERE A.REGST_DT LIKE #{regstDt} || '%' AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} ORDER BY A.EFFECTIVE_DATE DESC
mapper.sql: SELECT A.CUST_NM ,A.BIRTH_DT ,A.GENDER ,A.CTN ,A.SVC_CNTR_ID ,A.PROD_CD ,A.PROD_NM ,A.STATUS ,A.REG_DT ,A.OPEN_DT ,A.CAN_DT ,A.REG_TYPE ,A.INTERNET_ID ,A.COMB_YN ,A.CUST_ID ,B.FILE_NM FROM MSP_INET_INFO_HIST A, MDS_INET_INFO B WHERE 1=1 AND A.SVC_CNTR_ID = B.SVC_CNTR_ID AND A.INET_INFO_SEQ = B.INET_INFO_SEQ AND A.SVC_CNTR_ID = #{svcCntrId} ORDER BY A.REG_DT DESC
mapper.select: /* StatsMgmtMapper.getStatsInetList */
/* StatsMgmtMapper.getStatsInetHistList */
/* StatsMgmtMapper.getStatsInetListExcel */

SELECT TO_CHAR(TO_DATE(SUBSTR(PAY.RMNY_MM, 1, 9), 'YYYYMM'), 'YYYY-MM') AS RMNY_MM, (SELECT SUBSCRIBER_NO FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO WHERE CONTRACT_NUM = MCASH.CONTRACT_NUM AND ROWNUM = 1) AS MOBILE_NO, PAY.RMNY_AMT FROM MSP_MCASH_PAY_HIST PAY, NMCP_MCASH_USER@DL_MCP MCASH WHERE PAY.USERID = MCASH.USERID AND PAY.USERID = #{userId} ORDER BY PAY.RMNY_MM DESC
SELECT SUM(RMNY_AMT) AS RMNY_AMT_SUM FROM MSP_MCASH_PAY_HIST WHERE USERID = #{userId}

SELECT /* StatsMgmtMapper.getMcashJoinCustMgmtHist */ MCASH.USERID AS MASK_USER_ID, MCASH.SVC_CNTR_NO, (SELECT DTL_CD_NM FROM NMCP_CD_DTL@DL_MCP WHERE CD_GROUP_ID = 'McashEvntType' AND DTL_CD = MCASH.EVNT_TYPE) AS EVNT_TYPE, (SELECT DTL_CD_NM FROM NMCP_CD_DTL@DL_MCP WHERE CD_GROUP_ID = 'McashEvntTypeDtl' AND DTL_CD = MCASH.EVNT_TYPE_DTL) AS EVNT_TYPE_DTL, TO_CHAR(MCASH.RVISN_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS RVISN_DTTM, SUB.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS MOBILE_NO FROM NMCP_MCASH_USER_HIST@DL_MCP MCASH, MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO SUB WHERE MCASH.CONTRACT_NUM = SUB.CONTRACT_NUM AND MCASH.USERID = #{userId} ORDER BY MCASH.HIST_SEQ DESC

/* StatsMgmtMapper.getAppFormSyncDetailList */
WITH KTIS_KNOTE_SCAN_HIST_ALL AS ( SELECT ITEM_ID, REGST_DTTM, '성공' AS SUCC_YN, REGST_DT, '' AS OPRT_MOD, '' AS RSLT_CD, '' AS RSLT_CD_NM, '' AS MSG, '' AS CSV_FILE_NM, '' AS IMG_FILE_NM, 0 AS CSV_IMG_COUNT, 0 AS REAL_IMG_COUNT FROM KIS_KNOTE_SCAN_HIST WHERE ITEM_ID= #{itemId} UNION ALL SELECT ITEM_ID, REGST_DTTM, '실패' AS SUCC_YN, REGST_DT, OPRT_MOD, RSLT_CD, (SELECT CD_DSC FROM CMN_GRP_CD_MST WHERE GRP_ID = 'MSP0036' AND CD_VAL = RSLT_CD) AS RSLT_CD_NM, MSG, CSV_FILE_NM, IMG_FILE_NM, CSV_IMG_COUNT, REAL_IMG_COUNT FROM KIS_KNOTE_SCAN_FAIL WHERE ITEM_ID= #{itemId} AND RSLT_CD != '2001' ) SELECT ITEM_ID, TO_CHAR(REGST_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS REGST_DTTM, SUCC_YN, REGST_DT, OPRT_MOD, RSLT_CD, RSLT_CD_NM, MSG, CSV_FILE_NM, IMG_FILE_NM, CASE WHEN (CSV_IMG_COUNT = 0) THEN '' ELSE TO_CHAR(CSV_IMG_COUNT) END AS CSV_IMG_COUNT, CASE WHEN (REAL_IMG_COUNT = 0) THEN '' ELSE TO_CHAR(REAL_IMG_COUNT) END AS REAL_IMG_COUNT FROM KTIS_KNOTE_SCAN_HIST_ALL ORDER BY REGST_DTTM DESC
/*StatsMgmtMapper.getDisAddChkList*/
/*StatsMgmtMapper.getDisAddChkListExcel*/

/* StatsMgmtMapper.getDisAddList */
SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM , A.EVNT_TRTM_NO , A.EVNT_TRTM_DT , A.SOC AS SOC_CODE , FN_GET_RATENM(A.SOC) AS SOC_NM , A.FEATURE_CODE , A.SERVICE_TYPE , FN_GET_CODENM('MSP0008', A.SERVICE_TYPE) AS SERVICE_TYPE_NM , A.EFFECTIVE_DATE , A.EXPIRATION_DATE , CASE WHEN A.EXPIRATION_DATE >= TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') THEN '사용' ELSE '만료' END AS STATUS FROM MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO A , (SELECT RATE_CD FROM MSP_RATE_MST WHERE SERVICE_TYPE = 'R' AND BASE_AMT < 0) B WHERE A.SOC = B.RATE_CD AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} ORDER BY A.EFFECTIVE_DATE DESC

/* StatsMgmtMapper.getDisAddChk */ SELECT A.CHK_DT AS chkDt , A.CONTRACT_NUM AS contractNum , B.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS subscriberNo , B.CUSTOMER_ID AS customerId , A.LST_RATE_CD AS soc , A.PRMT_ID AS prmtId , A.CHK_RSLT AS chkRslt , A.RTY_YN AS rtyYn , A.KT_SOCS AS ktSocs , A.PRMT_SOCS AS prmtSocs , B.SVC_CNTR_NO AS ncn FROM MSP_DIS_DAILY_CHK A , MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO B WHERE A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM AND A.CHK_DT = #{chkDt} AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum}

/* StatsMgmtMapper.disAddEvntChk */ SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( /* 전일자 평생할인 부가서비스가 가입된 대상 */ SELECT CONTRACT_NUM , EVNT_CD , EVNT_TRTM_NO , EVNT_TRTM_DT , EFFECTIVE_DATE FROM MSP_JUO_FEATURE_INFO A , ( SELECT RATE.RATE_CD FROM MSP_RATE_MST RATE , CMN_GRP_CD_MST CD WHERE RATE.RATE_CD = CD.CD_VAL AND CD.GRP_ID = 'RCP2042' AND CD.ETC5 = 'DIS' ) B WHERE A.SOC = B.RATE_CD AND A.EFFECTIVE_DATE >= #{chkDt} || '000000' AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} UNION /* 전일자 업무구분별 평생할인 정책 적용 대상 */ SELECT CONTRACT_NUM , EVNT_CD , EVNT_TRTM_NO , EVNT_TRTM_DT , EFFECTIVE_DATE FROM MSP_DIS_TRG_MST WHERE REGST_DT >= #{chkDt} AND CONTRACT_NUM = #{contractNum} )
/* StatsMgmtMapper.getNameChgState */ SELECT PROC_CD , MCN_STATE_CODE , MEMO FROM NMCP_CUST_REQUEST_NAME_CHG@DL_MCP WHERE CUST_REQ_SEQ = #{custReqSeq}
mapper.insert:
SELECT SQ_RCP_RES_NO_01.NEXTVAL@DL_MCP FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO NMCP_CUST_REQUEST_NAME_CHG@DL_MCP ( CUST_REQ_SEQ , SCAN_ID , CSTMR_NAME , CSTMR_TYPE , CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN , ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE , ONLINE_AUTH_INFO , CLAUSE_CNTR_DEL_FLAG , CLAUSE_PRI_COLLECT_FLAG , CLAUSE_PRI_OFFER_FLAG , CLAUSE_ESS_COLLECT_FLAG , CLAUSE_PRI_AD_FLAG , CLAUSE_JEHU_FLAG , REQ_INFO_CHG_YN , SOC , SOC_NM , CSTMR_POST , CSTMR_ADDR , CSTMR_ADDR_DTL , CSTMR_BILL_SEND_CODE , CSTMR_MAIL , REQ_PAY_TYPE , REQ_BANK , REQ_ACCOUNT_NUMBER , REQ_CARD_COMPANY , REQ_CARD_NO , REQ_CARD_YY , REQ_CARD_MM , SELF_CERT_TYPE , SELF_ISSU_EXPR_DT , SELF_ISSU_NUM , CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_FN , CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_MN , CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_RN , PROC_CD , CRET_ID , CRET_DTTM , JEHU_PROD_TYPE , PERSONAL_INFO_COLLECT_AGREE , OTHERS_TRNS_AGREE , OTHERS_TRNS_KT_AGREE , OTHERS_AD_RECEIVE_AGREE , CSTMR_FOREIGNER_NATION , SELF_INQRY_AGRM_YN , MCN_RES_NO , MCN_STATE_CODE , MCN_STAT_RSN_CD , USIM_SUCC_YN , ICC_ID , AGNT_TEL_NO , FATH_TRG_YN , CLAUSE_FATH_FLAG , FATH_TRANSAC_ID , FATH_CMPLT_NTFY_DT , FATH_TEL_NO , RCV_CUST_NO , RCV_BILL_ACNT_NO , SELF_CSTMR_CI ) SELECT #{newCustReqSeq} , SCAN_ID , CSTMR_NAME , CSTMR_TYPE , CSTMR_NATIVE_RRN , ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE , ONLINE_AUTH_INFO , CLAUSE_CNTR_DEL_FLAG , CLAUSE_PRI_COLLECT_FLAG , CLAUSE_PRI_OFFER_FLAG , CLAUSE_ESS_COLLECT_FLAG , CLAUSE_PRI_AD_FLAG , CLAUSE_JEHU_FLAG , REQ_INFO_CHG_YN , SOC , SOC_NM , CSTMR_POST , CSTMR_ADDR , CSTMR_ADDR_DTL , CSTMR_BILL_SEND_CODE , CSTMR_MAIL , REQ_PAY_TYPE , REQ_BANK , REQ_ACCOUNT_NUMBER , REQ_CARD_COMPANY , REQ_CARD_NO , REQ_CARD_YY , REQ_CARD_MM , SELF_CERT_TYPE , SELF_ISSU_EXPR_DT , SELF_ISSU_NUM , CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_FN , CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_MN , CSTMR_RECEIVE_TEL_RN , 'RQ' , #{sessionUserId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , SYSDATE , JEHU_PROD_TYPE , PERSONAL_INFO_COLLECT_AGREE , OTHERS_TRNS_AGREE , OTHERS_TRNS_KT_AGREE , OTHERS_AD_RECEIVE_AGREE , CSTMR_FOREIGNER_NATION , SELF_INQRY_AGRM_YN , #{newMcnResNo} , '00' , MCN_STAT_RSN_CD , USIM_SUCC_YN , ICC_ID , AGNT_TEL_NO , FATH_TRG_YN , CLAUSE_FATH_FLAG , FATH_TRANSAC_ID , FATH_CMPLT_NTFY_DT , FATH_TEL_NO , RCV_CUST_NO , RCV_BILL_ACNT_NO , SELF_CSTMR_CI FROM NMCP_CUST_REQUEST_NAME_CHG@DL_MCP WHERE CUST_REQ_SEQ = #{custReqSeq}

/* StatsMgmtMapper.copyNameChgAgent */ INSERT INTO NMCP_CUST_REQ_NAME_CHG_AGENT@DL_MCP ( CUST_REQ_SEQ , NEE_AGENT_NAME , NEE_AGENT_RRN , NEE_AGENT_ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE , NEE_AGENT_ONLINE_AUTH_INFO , NEE_AGENT_SELF_CSTMR_CI , NEE_AGENT_TYPE_CD , NEE_AGENT_SELF_INQRY_AGRM_YN , NEE_AGENT_SELF_CERT_TYPE , NEE_AGENT_SELF_ISSU_EXPR_DT , NEE_AGENT_SELF_ISSU_NUM , NEE_AGENT_FOREIGNER_NATION , NEE_AGENT_TEL_NO , NOR_AGENT_NAME , NOR_AGENT_RRN , NOR_AGENT_ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE , NOR_AGENT_ONLINE_AUTH_INFO , NOR_AGENT_TYPE_CD , NOR_AGENT_SELF_INQRY_AGRM_YN , CRET_ID , CRET_DTTM , NOR_AGENT_TEL_NO ) SELECT #{newCustReqSeq} , NEE_AGENT_NAME , NEE_AGENT_RRN , NEE_AGENT_ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE , NEE_AGENT_ONLINE_AUTH_INFO , NEE_AGENT_SELF_CSTMR_CI , NEE_AGENT_TYPE_CD , NEE_AGENT_SELF_INQRY_AGRM_YN , NEE_AGENT_SELF_CERT_TYPE , NEE_AGENT_SELF_ISSU_EXPR_DT , NEE_AGENT_SELF_ISSU_NUM , NEE_AGENT_FOREIGNER_NATION , NEE_AGENT_TEL_NO , NOR_AGENT_NAME , NOR_AGENT_RRN , NOR_AGENT_ONLINE_AUTH_TYPE , NOR_AGENT_ONLINE_AUTH_INFO , NOR_AGENT_TYPE_CD , NOR_AGENT_SELF_INQRY_AGRM_YN , #{sessionUserId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} , SYSDATE , NOR_AGENT_TEL_NO FROM NMCP_CUST_REQ_NAME_CHG_AGENT@DL_MCP WHERE CUST_REQ_SEQ = #{custReqSeq}
